title: Create: Caverns And Chasms Silver Compatibility
description: Adds recipes to ensure crushed silver can be processed into Caverns And Chasms ingots and nuggets.
body:
## Overview
Bridge the gap between Create and Caverns And Chasms content mods. This data pack adds recipes to allow processing Create's crushed raw silver into Caverns And Chasms' silver nuggets and ingots. Added a bit of bonus redstone to feel "Vanilla Create".

## Recipes added
### Bulk washing (Encased fan + water)

- Crushed raw silver -> 9 silver nuggets + 75% chance of 3 redstone dust

### Smelting and Blasting

- Crushed raw silver -> Silver ingot

## Installation
Save the downloaded data pack .zip file to the `datapacks` folder of your world. If the world is live, use the command `/reload` to load it in. For more details check out the [documentation here](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Data_pack?so=search#Usage).

## Compatibility
Currently tested for 1.20.1 only, though very much open to expanding that range wherever Create and Caverns And Chasms can be applied. Feel free to get in touch via the Github [issues page](https://github.com/villainous-j/create-caverns-and-chasms-silver-compatibility-datapack/issues) if you have any requests!
